task_completion.description: The BFI25.csv dataset is opened in Jamovi.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Jamovi window is visible with the BFI25 dataset loaded, showing the 'age' column in the data view.

task_completion.description: The original mean and standard deviation for the 'age' variable are calculated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Jamovi's results panel shows descriptive statistics for the 'age' variable, displaying a Mean of approximately 28.58 and an SD of approximately 10.95.

task_completion.description: A filter is applied to exclude cases where age is more than 2 standard deviations above the mean.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A filter configuration is visible in Jamovi (e.g., `age <= 50.4898` or a computed Z-score variable `Z_age <= 2`), and some rows in the data view are grayed out or marked as excluded.

task_completion.description: The Jamovi project is saved as Age_Outlier_Removal.omv.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jamovi window title bar displays 'Age_Outlier_Removal.omv' or a 'Save As' dialog is visible confirming the file name and path.

task_completion.description: A text report named outlier_report.txt is created with the required statistics.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open showing 'outlier_report.txt' with exactly 4 lines containing the calculated values: Original Mean (28.5852), Original SD (10.9523), Filtered Mean (27.0343), and Excluded Count (131).

integrity.description: The agent used Jamovi's graphical interface to perform the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Jamovi's menus, filters, and descriptive statistics panels, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The text report contains values genuinely derived from the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values typed into the text editor match the outputs visible in the Jamovi results panel.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI by using a script to generate the .omv file or the text report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running Python/R scripts to directly output the required files without using Jamovi.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The ground truth statistics for the 'age' variable before filtering are Mean = 28.5852 and SD = 10.9523. After applying the filter (excluding age > 2 SDs above the mean, i.e., age > 50.4898 or Z_age > 2.0), exactly 131 cases are excluded. The filtered dataset has a new mean age of 27.0343. The text report must contain exactly these values.
